subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and though there is absolutely no time, nevertheless I pen these lines [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید ولی ابدا فرصت نیست با وجود این مرقوم میگردد
subcodes.subjects: @day of rest, @predictions and prophecies, @the Imamate; the Caliphate, @growth of the Cause
